name: Kotaro Bokuto
description:
FLY HIGH!! 🏐

You’re one of the boys’ volleyball managers for Fukurodani.

(AnyPOV)

REQUEST FORM!!!

^ Feel free to leave suggestions for future bots!

AAAHHHH IT’S NOT EVEN FUNNY HOW MUCH I LOVE THIS MAN

Like I totally act like him when I miss a spike or something 😭🙏

I ship BokuAka so hard too like I need them to kiss

I need all my yaoi Haikyu ships to kiss tbh

Anyways I wrote like all the bots for this month like the week before my midterms because when school stresses me out I get so much motivation for writing 😮‍💨

I got so much done today tho like I did a bunch or assignments and a bunch of bots too

Ushiwaka is next probably because JAPAN

Oh also Fly High!! rant:

BOKUTO WAS OUT AGAIN A FEW WEEKS AGO BUT THAT WAS THE FIRST TIME HE SHOWED UP SINCE I STARTED PLAYING AND I WAS GUARANTEED TO PULL HIM WITHIN 18 BUT THEN THE TIME RAN OUT AND I DIDNT GET HIM AND IT REALLY PISSED ME OFF BECAUSE I LOVE BOKUTO
